title: What is the best NLP library for sentiment analysis?
description: I need to perform sentiment analysis on customer reviews. Which NLP library is best for this task?
accepted_answer:
VADER from NLTK is great for sentiment analysis on social media and review texts: ```python
from nltk.sentiment.vader import SentimentIntensityAnalyzer

sid = SentimentIntensityAnalyzer()
text = 'This product is amazing!'
scores = sid.polarity_scores(text)
print(scores)
```
